title: Follow the action as Berkshire's shareholder meeting marks a new era without Buffett at the helm: Live updates
summary: Warren Buffett's absence from Berkshire Hathaway's annual shareholder meeting marks a pivotal transition as new CEO Greg Abel assumes primary leadership of the conglomerate. This shift represents a historic moment after decades of Buffett's dominant role in steering investor expectations. The meeting tests Abel's ability to maintain confidence in Berkshire's direction without its longtime leader.
content: Warren Buffett has loomed large at Berkshire Hathaway's annual shareholder meetings, and this will be a key challenge as new CEO Greg Abel takes center stage.

zh.title: 伯克希尔股东大会实时更新：标志着没有巴菲特掌舵的新时代
zh.summary: 沃伦·巴菲特缺席伯克希尔·哈撒韦年度股东大会标志着一个关键的过渡，新任首席执行官格雷格·阿贝尔承担起这家集团企业的主要领导责任。在巴菲特数十年来主导投资者预期之后，这一转变代表了一个历史性时刻。这次大会将考验阿贝尔在没有这位长期领导人的情况下维持伯克希尔信心的能力。

title: JPMorgan's best stock ideas heading into May
summary: JPMorgan has released its updated list of top stock recommendations as markets enter May trading. The curated picks reflect the firm's current strategic positioning and sector rotation views. These ideas guide investors navigating the new trading month's opportunities.
content: The firm has an updated list of top ideas as the new trading month commences.

zh.title: 摩根大通5月交易的最佳股票选择
zh.summary: 随着市场进入5月交易，摩根大通公布了其更新的顶级股票推荐清单。这些精选推荐反映了该公司当前的战略定位和板块轮动观点。这些建议指导投资者把握新交易月的机会。

title: Musk testimony dominated first week Musk v. Altman. 'You can't just steal a charity'
summary: Elon Musk testified for three days in his lawsuit against OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, focusing on accusations that OpenAI misappropriated his original contributions to the nonprofit. The trial highlights a high-profile clash between influential tech figures over the company's founding principles and direction. Musk's testimony dominated the first week, underscoring the case's prominence in technology circles.
content: Elon Musk, the world's richest person, took the stand and testified over the course of three days in his trial against OpenAI CEO Sam Altman.

zh.title: 穆斯克证词主导穆斯克诉阿尔特曼案首周。"你不能只是窃取一个慈善机构"
zh.summary: 埃隆·穆斯克在针对OpenAI首席执行官萨姆·阿尔特曼的诉讼中作证三天，重点是OpenAI挪用他对非营利组织的原始贡献的指控。这场诉讼突显了有影响力的科技人物之间关于公司创立原则和方向的高度关注的冲突。穆斯克的证词主导了第一周，强调了该案在科技界的显著地位。

title: Weight loss and hair loss: The growing hair treatment market from GLP-1s
summary: Hair loss has emerged as a significant side effect of GLP-1 weight loss medications, creating a new market opportunity for hair treatment products. As more people use these drugs for weight management, demand for solutions to counteract hair loss is accelerating. The trend demonstrates how pharmaceutical side effects can unexpectedly generate adjacent market opportunities.
content: A common side effect of many GLP-1 drugs is hair loss. It's creating a formerly untapped but growing market for hair treatment products.

zh.title: 减肥与脱发：GLP-1类药物推动的护发市场增长
zh.summary: 脱发已成为GLP-1减肥药物的一个重要副作用，为护发产品创造了新的市场机会。随着越来越多的人使用这些药物来管理体重，寻求对抗脱发的解决方案的需求在加速增长。这一趋势表明药物副作用如何能够意外地产生相邻的市场机遇。

title: This Japanese toilet maker seeking ‘the perfect flush’ is moonlighting as a hot AI play
summary: Toto, a Japanese toilet manufacturer, is positioning itself as a key player in semiconductor manufacturing by supplying electrostatic chucks critical to memory chip production. Beyond its efforts to develop self-cleaning toilets, the company gains significant exposure to the booming semiconductor market. The unlikely combination illustrates how traditional manufacturers are capitalizing on emerging tech demand.
content: Toto is “aiming to achieve a toilet that never needs cleaning.” It’s also supplying electrostatic chucks — a semiconductor-manufacturing component critical to the memory-chip boom.

zh.title: 这家寻求"完美冲洗"的日本马桶制造商正在做火热的AI相关业务
zh.summary: 日本卫浴制造商Toto通过供应对内存芯片生产至关重要的静电吸盘，将自己定位为半导体制造的关键参与者。除了致力于开发自清洁马桶外，该公司还在蓬勃发展的半导体市场中获得了重要敞口。这种看似矛盾的结合说明了传统制造商如何利用新兴技术需求。

title: These stocks reporting next week have earnings momentum on their side
summary: Datadog and Block are among companies reporting earnings next week while demonstrating accelerating earnings momentum. These strong fundamentals may shape market reaction to their upcoming announcements. Investors are watching these results for confirmation of current positive trends.
content: Stocks reporting earnings next week that are also seeing accelerating earnings momentum include Datadog and Block.

zh.title: 下周报告业绩的这些股票具有盈利动能优势
zh.summary: Datadog和Block等公司下周将发布财报，同时展现加速的盈利动能。这些强劲的基本面可能会影响市场对其即将公告的反应。投资者正在关注这些业绩以确认当前的积极趋势。

title: Japan just put a ‘Band-Aid’ on the yen. Why high oil prices could soon rip it off.
summary: Japan's central bank has stabilized the yen from near 40-year lows, but rising oil prices threaten these gains and intensify inflation concerns. High energy costs add to deflationary pressures in Japan's economy, complicating the BOJ's stabilization efforts. The situation reflects broader economic vulnerabilities amid global commodity price pressures.
content: Concerns about high oil prices are adding to inflation fears in Japan, as the BOJ just moved to rescue the yen from a roughly 40-year low.

zh.title: 日本给日元贴上了"创可贴"。高油价为何可能很快就会撕掉它？
zh.summary: 日本央行已将日元从近40年低位稳定下来，但油价上升威胁这些进展并加剧通胀担忧。高能源成本增加了日本经济的通缩压力，使日本央行的稳定化工作复杂化。这一局面反映了全球商品价格压力中更广泛的经济脆弱性。

title: ‘We’re all worried the honey pot will run dry’: Does the U.S. government borrow from my Social Security to fund federal programs?
summary: Washington policymakers are debating solutions to Social Security's impending funding crisis, with questions emerging about whether the federal government borrows from the program to fund other initiatives. Multiple proposals are circulating to address the system's long-term sustainability. The program faces urgent reform requirements to ensure future solvency.
content: There are many suggestions floating around Washington D.C. on how to fix the program’s imminent funding issues.

zh.title: "我们都担心金库会干枯"：美国政府是否向我的社会保障借钱来资助联邦项目？
zh.summary: 华盛顿决策者正在辩论社会保障即将到来的资金危机的解决方案，并讨论联邦政府是否从该项目借钱来资助其他倡议。多项提案正在流通以解决该系统的长期可持续性。该项目面临紧急改革要求以确保未来偿债能力。

title: ‘We are old school’: I’ve been married for 40 years. Should I have kept my money separate?
summary: A 40-year married couple maintains mostly joint financial accounts except for their IRAs, raising questions about optimal financial structures in long-term relationships. Their arrangement illustrates different approaches to spousal money management across decades. Financial advisors often debate the merits of joint versus separate accounts in marriage.
content: “We have all of our financial accounts joint except for our IRAs.”

zh.title: "我们是传统派"：我已结婚40年。我应该保持财务独立吗？
zh.summary: 一对已婚40年的夫妇主要保持联合财务账户，除了个人退休账户，这引发了关于长期关系中最佳财务结构的问题。他们的安排体现了几十年来配偶财务管理的不同方法。财务顾问经常争论婚姻中联合账户与独立账户的优缺点。

title: ‘There is an imbalance of power’: My husband has cancer. Why must we wait two hours for a 10-minute CT scan?
summary: A patient's family advocates for healthcare system improvements after experiencing lengthy waits for critical medical appointments while managing a spouse's cancer diagnosis. The letter highlights systemic inefficiencies in appointment scheduling and medical resource allocation. These delays can significantly impact patient outcomes and quality of life during critical health situations.
content: “This letter is in memory of all the patients who died waiting for their medical appointments to begin.”

zh.title: "权力失衡"：我的丈夫患有癌症。为什么我们要为一个10分钟的CT扫描等待两小时？
zh.summary: 患者家属在配偶癌症诊断期间经历了关键医疗预约的长时间等待后，倡导医疗系统改革。这封信突出了预约调度和医疗资源分配中的系统性低效率。这些延误可能在关键健康状况期间对患者预后和生活质量产生显著影响。

title: Gas prices are high right now. Use these 6 tools to save on fuel
summary: CNBC offers practical strategies for consumers to reduce fuel expenses as gas prices remain elevated, including wholesale club memberships and existing service programs. These money-saving approaches range from leveraging existing services to strategic purchasing decisions. The guidance addresses immediate consumer concerns about transportation costs.
content: From joining a wholesale club to using memberships you may already have, these are our tips for saving at the pump.

zh.title: 汽油价格现在很高。使用这6个工具来节省燃料
zh.summary: CNBC在汽油价格保持高位的情况下，为消费者提供了减少燃料支出的实用策略，包括批发俱乐部会员资格和现有服务计划。这些省钱方法从利用现有服务到战略采购决策不等。该指导针对消费者对运输成本的直接关切。

title: Germany urges stronger European defense after U.S. reduces troops
summary: Germany is urging stronger European military spending and defense capabilities following the Pentagon's announcement to withdraw 5,000 troops from its largest European base. The troop reduction reflects shifting U.S. military strategy and prompts European nations to reconsider defense independence. Germany's call underscores growing concerns about European security as U.S. military presence decreases.
content: The Pentagon announced on Friday that the U.S. would withdraw 5,000 soldiers from Germany, its largest European base.

zh.title: 美国减少驻军后，德国敦促加强欧洲防御
zh.summary: 在五角大楼宣布从其最大欧洲基地撤出5000名士兵后，德国敦促加强欧洲军事支出和防御能力。这种驻军减少反映了美国军事战略的转变，促使欧洲国家重新考虑防御独立性。德国的呼吁强调了随着美国军事存在减少而对欧洲安全日益增长的关注。

title: Spirit Airlines shutting down after rescue talks collapse
summary: Spirit Airlines is ceasing operations after negotiations with the Trump administration over a proposed $500 million bailout collapsed. The airline's closure marks a significant consolidation in the U.S. aviation industry. The failed rescue effort reflects broader challenges facing low-cost carriers in the current economic environment.
content: The airline had been in talks with the Trump administration about a $500m bailout.

zh.title: Spirit航空公司在救援谈判失败后关闭
zh.summary: Spirit航空公司在与特朗普政府关于提议的5亿美元救助的谈判失败后停止运营。这家航空公司的关闭标志着美国航空业的重大整合。失败的救援努力反映了低成本航空公司在当前经济环境中面临的更广泛挑战。

title: Apple just gave a clue that a big AI acquisition may be in the cards
summary: Apple has retired its net-cash-neutral financial target, signaling a potential shift toward larger acquisitions. Analysts view this move as a possible indicator that the company may pursue significant deals in AI and other areas beyond its typical smaller investments.
content: With Apple officially retiring its net-cash-neutral target, some suspect the company will look to conduct more transformative M&A, beyond the smaller deals it made in the past.

zh.title: 苹果暗示可能进行大规模人工智能收购
zh.summary: 苹果已放弃其净现金中立财务目标，表明公司可能转向进行更大规模的收购。分析师认为这一举措可能表明该公司可能在人工智能和其他领域进行重大交易，超越其典型的小规模投资。

title: Spirit Airlines could shut down overnight. Here's what travelers need to know
summary: Spirit Airlines faces potential overnight shutdown, affecting ticketed passengers who need to understand their options and passenger protections. The article provides guidance on what travelers should do if the carrier ceases operations.
content: What travelers who are ticketed on Spirit Airlines need to know if the carrier shuts down.

zh.title: 精神航空公司可能一夜间关闭。旅客需要了解什么
zh.summary: 精神航空公司面临一夜间关闭的可能性,影响持票乘客需要了解其选择和乘客保护。该文章为旅客提供了如果承运人停止运营应该采取的措施指导。

title: Bard College President Leon Botstein retiring after Jeffrey Epstein ties detailed
summary: Bard College President Leon Botstein is retiring after facing mounting pressure related to revealed communications with Jeffrey Epstein documented by DOJ releases. His departure ends a lengthy tenure amid the scandal's fallout.
content: Bard College's long-time leader Leon Botstein has faced pressure since the DOJ released documents about his communications with Jeffrey Epstein.

zh.title: 巴德学院院长莱昂·博特斯坦因与杰弗里·爱泼斯坦关系曝光后退休
zh.summary: 巴德学院院长莱昂·博特斯坦在面临与杰弗里·爱泼斯坦的来往通信问题日益增大的压力后退休,这些通信由司法部发布的文件记录。他的离职在丑闻的余波中结束了其长期的任期。
